# CGIC — Staffing & Consulting (Full Documentation)

> CGIC is a staffing and consulting company based in Brussels, Belgium.
> Part of Alsena Group. We connect top talent with companies shaping tomorrow's world.

## Company Overview

CG International Consulting SRL (CGIC) is a Belgian staffing and consulting firm
specializing in IT talent placement, strategic consulting, and digital transformation
project management. We serve enterprise clients across Belgium and Europe with a
focus on technology sector staffing.

### Legal Information
- **Legal Name**: CG International Consulting SRL
- **Address**: 523 Avenue Louise, 1050 Brussels, Belgium
- **LEI**: 875500UBAMWWIUVFT022
- **DUNS**: 37-199-0796

### Mission
Connecting top talent with companies shaping tomorrow's world. We believe
human capital is the engine of every success.

### Values
- **Excellence**: We strive for excellence in every assignment, placement, and advice
- **Integrity**: Transparency and honesty at the heart of all interactions
- **Innovation**: Adopting best practices and technologies to stay at the forefront

## Services Detail

### IT Staffing
We identify and deploy the best technology profiles for critical projects.
Our recruitment team screens candidates across all major technology stacks
and delivers pre-vetted consultants within short timeframes.

### Strategic Consulting
Our senior consultants guide clients in defining and executing their strategy.
We provide C-level advisory services, organizational design, and change
management support.

### Project Management
End-to-end management of digital transformation projects. From scoping through
delivery, our certified project managers ensure on-time, on-budget execution
with clear governance frameworks.

### Permanent Recruitment
Finding talent who will become lasting members of your organization. Our
permanent recruitment service covers executive search, mid-level placement,
and specialized technology hiring.

### Training & Coaching
Custom development programs for teams. We design and deliver training
curricula in leadership, technical skills, and organizational transformation.

### Audit & Advisory
In-depth assessment of processes and optimization recommendations. Our audit
practice covers IT governance, security posture, and operational efficiency.

## Company Facts

- 150+ active consultants
- 50+ enterprise clients
- 12 years of experience
- 98% client satisfaction rate
- Available in French, English, and Dutch
